programme.title: Property Brothers: Under Pressure
programme.desc: A couple are raising their two kids in the home she inherited from her grandmother, rich in history but short on space. They're calling on Jonathan and Drew to help decide whether to reshape a legacy home that no longer works or move on entirely.

programme.title: Love It or List It
programme.desc: A couple purchased a century-old triplex with big renovation dreams, but now it has become a money pit; Hilary wants to help them conquer the remodel, but David knows some properties with all the space and function this growing family needs now.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Love It or List It
programme.desc: Anu and Samir rushed their first house purchasing shortly after getting married; Samir can't believe their luck in finding a home in this location, but Anu thinks they may have overlooked big issues in their rush to buy.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Love It or List It
programme.desc: A couple and their three sons have been in their outdated home for almost 20 years, and it's in need of a major overhaul; she thinks if Hilary gets it right, they'll fall in love with their house again, but he feels David can bring the best solution.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Love It or List It
programme.desc: A married couple with twin teen sons are in a home that's been causing tension and stress for a long time; one has a sentimental attachment and thinks Hilary can transform the space, but the other can't wait for David to find them the new place.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Love It or List It
programme.desc: A woman has been in her home since she was a baby, but her partner doesn't hold the same sentimental values and wants to be near the city; she thinks he'll choose to stay with the right updates, but David has some homes that could lure her away.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Rock the Block
programme.desc: The stars turn up the heat when they design dazzling kitchens and dining rooms in Week Three; teams go all-in, some desperate for their first win, and Page Turner from "Love It or List It" arrives to judge the gorgeous results.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: World's Bargain Dream Homes
programme.desc: On the Spanish coast just south of Barcelona, best friends from Texas look for an affordable dream home near Tarragona; with a local property expert, they tour through all the local culture and traditions the flavorful region has to offer.

programme.title: World's Bargain Dream Homes
programme.desc: A creative pair are ready to relocate for an artistic life in Puglia, Italy. With an expert local guide, they experience Italian countryside La Dolce Vita and tour breathtaking bargain homes that are far beyond what they could afford in the US.

programme.title: World's Bargain Dream Homes
programme.desc: A Seattle couple's ready to take a bold leap and start a family in Spain; with a local property expert guiding the way, they tour breathtaking bargain homes near Granada and see stunning places far beyond what they could ever afford in the U.S.

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: In need of more space, a couple looks to buy their first home in Raleigh, N. C.; up against a tough market, he's willing to take on projects or consider townhomes, but she's determined to find a single-family home that's move-in ready.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: A young professional is tired of spending money on rent and has her sights set on a historic walk-up condo in Chicago; she's bringing her analytical ex-boyfriend on the search; he thinks she should consider a newer, high-rise condo.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: An expecting couple has seen over 50 houses, and they're still reluctant to commit to anything less than the perfect place in New Jersey. She's ready to make sacrifices to be settled before the birth, but he's finding flaws in every home they see.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: Transplants in Washington, D.C., look to put down roots in their new city; one prefers a row home to fix up with his family's help; the other doesn't want any projects and thinks a modern condo is a better choice.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: A caterer is ready to become a homeowner again in Atlanta; he's looking for a modern home with the space and kitchen to expand his business, and his close friend is along to keep him focused and mindful of his finances.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: A newlywed couple looks to move from Washington, DC, to be near her family in Philadelphia. She's an antique collector and wants a historic home, but he prefers something modern with tons of space to grow their family.

programme.title: World's Bargain Dream Homes
programme.desc: A Seattle couple's ready to take a bold leap and start a family in Spain; with a local property expert guiding the way, they tour breathtaking bargain homes near Granada and see stunning places far beyond what they could ever afford in the U.S.

programme.title: Bahamas Life
programme.desc: A Russian couple from North Carolina are exploring Long Island to find their tropical retreat.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Bahamas Life
programme.desc: An adventurous couple feel that Long Island in the Bahamas is the perfect place to continue trying new experiences; they must decide if they prefer a turn-key home they can enjoy immediately or a fixer-upper they can customize to suit their needs.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Bahamas Life
programme.desc: Corey and Kyrene are looking to purchase their first home together in Kyrene's native Nassau; while she approaches it all with local knowledge and definitive opinions, this is all new to Midwesterner Corey.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Bahamas Life
programme.desc: After spending a few years in the U.S., a Bahamian couple miss the islands; returning to Nassau doesn't feel right, so they look to move to the more laid-back island of Eleuthera.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt
programme.sub-title: Love and Listings on the Northern Coast of Oregon
programme.desc: Jacob falls in love with his real estate agent, Ciji; now, they shop for a beach-side vacation home together, and Ciji's background is sure to help them land the perfect property along the northern coast of Oregon.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt
programme.sub-title: A Girls Getaway on Mobile Bay
programme.desc: A woman and her daughter -- feeling outnumbered by the seven boys in their blended family -- are looking for a waterfront getaway in Mobile Bay, Ala.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt
programme.sub-title: A Promise Kept in Panama City
programme.desc: Before they were married, Arun promised Becky they would have a house on the beach someday; 12 years and two children later, life is hectic, and it's time for the couple to find a home in Panama City, Fla.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt
programme.sub-title: The Sun Never Sets on a Beach Dream
programme.desc: Every trip to Sunset Beach, N.C., a tight-knit family of three falls deeper in love with the town's natural beauty; after years of saving and crashing at their friend's house, they're finally ready to carve out their own slice of paradise.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt
programme.sub-title: All Roads Lead Back to Myrtle
programme.desc: A traveling nurse who has always dreamed of living near the water searches in Myrtle Beach, S.C., for a beachy retreat from her busy life on the road.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt
programme.sub-title: Beach Bound and Down for a Deal
programme.desc: A recently engaged couple look to trade their busy city life for a home in the coastal resort town of Carolina Beach; they may not agree on what they want in a new beach house, but in North Carolina's hot market, time is a luxury they can't afford.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: A family from Austin, Texas, has decided to permanently relocate to the small coastal town of Cameron, La.; they've packed up their camper, hit the road and hope to find an affordable property on their very first trip to the Gulf Coast.

programme.desc: The stars turn up the heat when they design dazzling kitchens and dining rooms in Week Three; teams go all-in, some desperate for their first win, and Page Turner from "Love It or List It" arrives to judge the gorgeous results.

programme.title: Why the Heck Did I Buy This House?
programme.desc: A couple closed on their 1950s midcentury ranch sight unseen, but it quickly turned into a nightmare of leaking pipes and dysfunctional rooms; Kim and her team take this disaster of a house and turn it into their dream desert oasis.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Why the Heck Did I Buy This House?
programme.desc: A couple fell in love with the exterior of their new home, but unfortunately, that love stopped at the front door; with a dysfunction that's too much to bear, Kim and her team face the challenge of turning their confused home into a relaxing rancher.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Why the Heck Did I Buy This House?
programme.desc: After three decades in Manhattan, a music teacher returns home to San Antonio to purchase a palatial dream home, but it soon turns into a nightmare.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Renovation Aloha
programme.sub-title: There's a Tree Growing Through the Roof!
programme.desc: Kamohai and Tristyn track down the owners of a home that's been abandoned for 20 years and purchase it; the house is in a great location but in rough shape with a tree growing through the roof.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Renovation Aloha
programme.sub-title: House Held Up by Car Jacks
programme.desc: Kamohai and Tristyn buy a house that is so termite eaten they don't even need a hammer for demolition; more problems appear as they peel back the layers as they discover a deck being held up by a rope and a foundation that's on carjacks.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Renovation Aloha
programme.desc: When Kamohai and Tristyn buy a family home from Kamohai's cousin, they're torn between honoring generations of Kalama legacy and making the numbers work.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Renovation Aloha
programme.desc: In the second phase of their ambitious renovation, Kamohai and Tristyn tackle the remaining three units of their Kalama Street compound; they're hoping for a value high enough to keep the property in the family.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Tropic Like It's Hot
programme.desc: A spicy California couple, who have been together since their teens, are ready to heat things up with a bold move to Roatán, Honduras; they're all in, but they have opposing ideas on what they want for their new island dream home.

programme.title: Tropic Like It's Hot
programme.desc: A couple has endured a cramped condo in order to fund their fantasy for an island escape in St. Thomas; they're ready to ditch the city and find a dream home where they can move from their tiny quarters to endless nights of tropical romance.

programme.title: Tropic Like It's Hot
programme.desc: Two besties are pooling their cash to buy a shared home in Tulum, Mexico; they want a permanent slice of paradise, but finding a house that suits them both might be the biggest test of their friendship.

programme.title: Tropic Like It's Hot
programme.sub-title: A Leap of Love in Tulum
programme.desc: After nine months of dating, a Canadian couple's ready to find a love nest and build a business in Tulum, Mexico; trading snow for sand is easy, but buying a home with a new partner is a risky move that may be too much too soon.

programme.title: Tropic Like It's Hot
programme.desc: After living on their boat for four years, a couple's ready to buy a home on the Caribbean island of Bonaire; they want to start a charter business with their catamaran, but they may have to sell their beloved Texas home.

programme.title: Tropic Like It's Hot
programme.desc: A couple that owns two wedding venues in Texas are ready to find a Bahamian vacation home on the island of Eleuthera; after years of hosting everyone else's happily-ever-afters, they're taking a timeout to find a home for their own love story.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.desc: A Miami native and a European fall for Mexico while on vacation and decide to move, and they've both asked their sisters to help with house hunting in Mexico City and Playa del Carmen.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.desc: A mother and daughter duo are ready to ditch Nashville to chase a dream in Les 7 Vallées, France. Mom wants traditional French charm and doesn't mind projects, but her daughter prefers something modern that's turnkey.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: A Family's Fresh Start in Edinburgh
programme.desc: After a health crisis, a New Jersey couple looks for a fresh start with their two kids in Edinburgh, Scotland; they're looking for a place near the city center, and while she wants a home with Scottish charm, he prefers something that's more modern.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.desc: After two years in a long-distance relationship, a newly engaged couple decides to live together for the first time in Amsterdam. She's looking for Dutch charm near the city center, but he prefers a place in a more quiet area that's clean and modern.

programme.title: Tropic Like It's Hot
programme.desc: A couple that owns two wedding venues in Texas are ready to find a Bahamian vacation home on the island of Eleuthera; after years of hosting everyone else's happily-ever-afters, they're taking a timeout to find a home for their own love story.

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: Two sisters and one of their boyfriends seek a house together in New York; but finding a home where all three of them can live, without it getting awkward, is almost impossible.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: A single dad is moving back to Sacramento, Calif., to be near his son's performing arts school; he's looking for a small farmhouse-style place with a pool, but his mom plans to visit often, and she wants plenty of space to entertain.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.sub-title: Time Is of the Essence in Indiana
programme.desc: A growing family is in desperate need of a bigger house in South Bend, Indiana; the house needs to have room for his mom who is also moving in; time is not on their side as they need to find a home before baby number three arrives.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: A single mom gets a chance to fulfill her dream of homeownership after receiving a surprise inheritance in Birmingham, Ala.; she wants a small Craftsman for herself and her daughter, but her very opinionated aunt has a few other ideas in mind.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: A twenty-something single woman looks to buy her first home in Philadelphia; she wants a big, turnkey house in the suburbs, but her friend thinks she should stay in the city.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: A Denver couple's moving to be closer to their son in Seattle. They want a place with plenty of room to entertain family, but high prices and their fear of gloomy weather is making it hard to agree on what they want.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: Fresh off a divorce, a free-spirited buyer searches for a home of her own in Toledo, Ohio; she can be impulsive and doesn't mind spending, but her close friend is along on the search and hopes to keep her grounded and under budget.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: After years of moving for work, a couple's ready to settle down near their son and granddaughter in Raleigh, N.C.; since it's their ninth home, they're being very particular about all the details.

programme.desc: A couple tours three houses in Waco, Texas, and although their wishlist is small, so is their budget.

programme.title: Fixer Upper
programme.desc: A family is on the lookout for a spacious home for some lakeside fun.

programme.desc: A couple tours three houses in the Wooded Acres neighborhood that can accommodate four children and a new baby.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses
programme.sub-title: A First House to a Future Sale?
programme.desc: A couple has been in their starter home for 20 years and is ready to move out and up, but the numbers have them looking at their current house with new eyes.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Unsellable Houses
programme.sub-title: To Move or Not To Move
programme.desc: A couple who are staples of their community are ready for a home renovation but she's more excited about the change than he is; Lyndsay and Leslie step in to get her the updated space she wants while retaining all the qualities he seeks to keep.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Unsellable Houses
programme.desc: A couple loves the neighborhood where they've raised three kids, but they've grown tired of their house of over 20 years; Lyndsay and Leslie step in to help guide their decision between updating their current home.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Unsellable Houses
programme.desc: A widow and her son need help to give their 14-room Victorian farmhouse a more broad appeal. Over the course of only five days, Lyndsay and Leslie transform their uniquely personalized home into a marketable property.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
